SEO.title: Login
SEO.description: Sign in to your account.

SEO.title: Create an account
SEO.description: Sign up for a new account.

SEO.title: Reset your password
SEO.description: Request a code to reset your password.

PlacesAutocomplete.error: Could not load the selected place.

LocationMap.description: The pin and coordinates appear here automatically once you select an address above.

Footer.tagline: Guest perks that make every stay feel local. Free for accommodations; hospitalities pay only on real results.

LoginFormNoImage.title: Login
LoginFormNoImage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
LoginFormNoImage.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

LoginFormWithImage.title: Login to your account
LoginFormWithImage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
LoginFormWithImage.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

EmailVerificationForm.title: Check your email
EmailVerificationForm.description: We sent a verification code to {email}. Enter it below to continue.
EmailVerificationForm.codeHint: Enter the 8-digit code from your email.
EmailVerificationForm.verificationFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

PasswordResetForm.descriptionRequest: Enter the email for your account. We will send you a one-time code you can use to choose a new password.
PasswordResetForm.descriptionReset: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below along with your new password. The code is valid for 5 minutes.

SEO.title: Your accommodation starts here
SEO.description: Unlock the perks your host prepared for this accommodation.

ActivatePage.title: Your accommodation starts here
ActivatePage.description: Unlock the perks your host prepared for this accommodation.

SEO.title: Your accommodation
SEO.description: View your accommodation details and partner perks.

StaySharingCode.title: Let your room companions in
StaySharingCode.body: Anyone staying with you can scan the room QR code, then enter this sharing code.
StaySharingCode.privacy: Share this code only with people in your accommodation.

StayJoinAccessForm.title: Join an unlocked accommodation
StayJoinAccessForm.activeTitle: Someone has already unlocked this accommodation
StayJoinAccessForm.body: If you are staying together, enter the sharing code from their partners page to open the same benefits on this device.
StayJoinAccessForm.directBody: Already staying with someone who has unlocked partners? Ask for the sharing code shown on their accommodation page.
StayJoinAccessForm.label: Sharing code
StayJoinAccessForm.hint: The code appears at the top of the unlocked accommodation page.
StayJoinAccessForm.unavailable: Could not check that code. Check your connection and try again.
StayJoinAccessForm.scanInstead: You can also scan the QR code in your room to start a new accommodation.

StayEmpty.title: Accommodation not found
StayEmpty.body: This QR points to an accommodation that isn’t active. Double-check the code or ask your host.

StayPartnershipsEmpty.title: No partners linked yet
StayPartnershipsEmpty.body: Your host hasn’t connected this accommodation to a partner hospitality yet. Ask them about it — they can add partners in seconds.

StayError.title: Couldn’t load your partners
StayError.body: Check your connection and try again.

StayPartnershipsError.title: Couldn’t load your partners
StayPartnershipsError.body: Check your connection and try again.

StayExpiredAccess.title: Your accommodation session has expired
StayExpiredAccess.body: Scan the QR in your room to unlock your partners again.

StayPartnershipsSection.partnersLead: Tap any place to see what's waiting for you inside — then just show this page to redeem. No app, no account.

SEO.description: View hospitality details and request a reservation.

HospitalityPartnership.body: Show this accommodation page at {hospitalityName}; staff can honor the listed benefit.
HospitalityPartnership.sourceNote: This benefit comes from the accommodation you scanned from.

HospitalityError.title: Couldn’t load this page
HospitalityError.body: Check your connection and try again.

HospitalityEmpty.title: Hospitality not available
HospitalityEmpty.body: This hospitality page is missing or no longer active.
HospitalityEmpty.notPartneredTitle: Hospitality not included with this accommodation
HospitalityEmpty.notPartneredBody: This accommodation is not partnered with this hospitality. Open a hospitality from your accommodation partners list instead.

SignUpFormNoImage.title: Create an account
SignUpFormNoImage.description: Enter your information below to create your account
SignUpFormNoImage.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
SignUpFormNoImage.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.
SignUpFormNoImage.signUpFailed: We couldn't create your account. Check your details and try again, or sign in if you already have one.

SignUpFormWithImage.title: Create your account
SignUpFormWithImage.description: Fill in the form below to create your account
SignUpFormWithImage.emailHelp: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
SignUpFormWithImage.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters long.
SignUpFormWithImage.signUpFailed: We couldn't create your account. Check your details and try again, or sign in if you already have one.

UploadFileMultiple.placeholder: Uploaded files. Drop more files here to add.

UploadFileSingle.existingCoverHint: Pick a new file below to replace it on save.
UploadFileSingle.placeholder: File preview. Drop a file here to replace.

AccommodationQrDialog.title: QR for {name}
AccommodationQrDialog.description: Print this code in the unit. Guests scan it to unlock perks for this accommodation.
AccommodationQrDialog.localhostWarning: PUBLIC_SITE_URL points to localhost. Printed codes will not work for real guests until you set your production domain.

ErrorPage.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
ErrorPage.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

DataTableEmpty.title: No results
DataTableEmpty.description: Nothing to show yet. Try adjusting filters or add new data.

DataTable.selectAllRowsOnThisPage: Select all rows on this page

AlertDialogButton.title: Action cannot be reversed
AlertDialogButton.description: Are you sure you want to do this? This action cannot be undone.

SEO.title: My accommodations
SEO.description: Review accommodations assigned to your account. Edit details and check whether each guest QR page is active.

MyAccommodationsPage.assignedStaysDescription: Compact overview of accommodation type, status, and location for each assigned accommodation.

MyAccommodationsHeader.title: My accommodations
MyAccommodationsHeader.description: Review accommodations assigned to your account. Edit details and check whether each guest QR page is active.

MyAccommodationsEmpty.title: No accommodations assigned yet
MyAccommodationsEmpty.description: When the {companyName} team assigns an accommodation to your account, it will appear here.
MyAccommodationsEmpty.hint: Assigned accommodations become editable from this page

SEO.title: Add accommodation
SEO.description: Create an accommodation owned by your account. A guest QR token is generated automatically.

AddAccommodationPage.title: Add accommodation
AddAccommodationPage.description: Create an accommodation for your account. The guest QR token is generated automatically.
AddAccommodationPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests and staff will see at a glance.
AddAccommodationPage.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on the guest scan page and used for filtering.
AddAccommodationPage.sectionCoverDescription: Shown on the guest scan page. PNG or JPG recommended; aim for a wide aspect ratio.
AddAccommodationPage.sectionDetailsDescription: Optional notes shown on the guest benefits page.
AddAccommodationPage.fieldCoordinatesPlaceholder: These will automatically populate once you wrote the address
AddAccommodationPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page (optional).

SEO.title: My hospitalities
SEO.description: Manage hospitality details, guest-facing availability, and accommodation connections for the hospitalities assigned to your account.

MyHospitalitiesPage.assignedVenuesDescription: Compact overview of hospitality type, status, and guest-facing availability.

MyHospitalitiesHeader.title: My hospitalities
MyHospitalitiesHeader.description: Manage hospitality details, guest-facing availability, and accommodation connections for the hospitalities assigned to your account.

MyHospitalitiesEmpty.title: No hospitalities yet
MyHospitalitiesEmpty.description: Add a venue you run yourself, or wait for one to be assigned to your account — either way it will appear here.

SEO.title: Reservations
SEO.description: Manage incoming guest requests across your hospitalities — accept, decline, and track every booking.

ReservationsHeader.title: Reservations
ReservationsHeader.description: Manage incoming guest requests across your hospitalities — accept, decline, and track every booking.

ReservationCancelButton.label: Decline
ReservationCancelButton.title: Decline request
ReservationCancelButton.description: Decline {guestName}'s reservation request? This will move it to cancelled reservations.

ReservationConfirmButton.label: Confirm
ReservationConfirmButton.title: Confirm reservation
ReservationConfirmButton.description: Confirm {guestName}'s reservation request? This will move it to confirmed reservations.

ReservationNoShowButton.label: Mark no-show
ReservationNoShowButton.title: Mark as no-show
ReservationNoShowButton.description: Mark {guestName}'s confirmed reservation as no-show? This will move it to the no-show tab.

ContactViaWhatsappButton.label: Contact via WhatsApp
ContactViaWhatsappButton.message: Hello {guestName}, your reservation at {hospitalityName} is confirmed.

ReservationsEmpty.title: You do not own any hospitalities
ReservationsEmpty.description: Reservation requests will appear here once hospitalities are assigned to your account by the {companyName} team.

ReservationsPendingTabEmpty.title: No pending reservations

ReservationsPastTabEmpty.title: No past reservations
ReservationsPastTabEmpty.description: Completed reservations will be archived here.

SEO.title: Edit accommodation
SEO.description: Update how this accommodation appears to guests. The in-room QR code stays the same.

EditAccommodationEmpty.title: Accommodation not found
EditAccommodationEmpty.description: This accommodation may have been removed or is not assigned to your account.

EditAccommodationHeader.title: Edit accommodation
EditAccommodationHeader.description: Update how this accommodation appears to guests. The in-room QR code stays the same.

EditAccommodationForm.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests and staff will see at a glance.
EditAccommodationForm.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on the guest benefits page.
EditAccommodationForm.sectionCoverDescription: Leave empty to keep the current image. PNG or JPG recommended.
EditAccommodationForm.fieldCoordinatesPlaceholder: These will automatically populate once you wrote the address
EditAccommodationForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page (optional).
EditAccommodationForm.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive accommodations stay in the database but their QR page won't render benefits.

EditAccommodationGuestAccess.sectionGuestAccessDescription: The QR code is tied to this unit. Print it from here if you need a new copy.

EditAccommodationPage.errorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

CreateType.title: Partnership type
CreateType.platformDescription: Visible to every guest as an implicit partner of all accommodations.
CreateType.customDescription: Reachable only through a custom-partnership connect code.
CreateType.toCustomDescription: It stops being visible to all guests. It keeps its connect code and can be linked via custom partnerships. Nothing is deleted.
CreateType.toPlatformDescription: It becomes visible to every guest as an implicit partner. Only allowed when it has no active partnerships.

AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests will see in the benefits list.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on your public hospitality page.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionContactDescription: Phone number guests can use to contact this hospitality.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionImagesDescription: The first image is the cover. Reorder by starring any image, remove ones you don't want, and drop in new files.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionMenuDescription: Optional. Leave the file empty to keep the current menu.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.fieldMenuFileHint: Upload an image or a PDF of your menu.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.fieldCoordinatesPlaceholder: These will automatically populate once you wrote the address
AdminEditHospitalityForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive hospitalities stay in the database but won't appear in benefit lists.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.sectionAdminDescription: Fields only an admin can edit.
AdminEditHospitalityForm.fieldBenefitHint: The offer shown to guests for this hospitality.

SEO.title: Accommodations
SEO.description: Places guests stay — apartments, hotels, villas, and more. Each row gets an auto-generated scan token for printed QRs.

AdminAccommodationsPage.title: Accommodations
AdminAccommodationsPage.description: Places guests stay — apartments, hotels, villas, and more. Each row gets an auto-generated scan token for printed QRs.
AdminAccommodationsPage.caption: Accommodations

DeleteAccommodationButton.title: Delete this accommodation?
DeleteAccommodationButton.description: This permanently removes {accommodationName} from the platform. Guests will no longer be able to scan its QR code. An active guest session or partnership must be cleared first.

SEO.title: Add accommodation
SEO.description: Create a new property. A secret scan token for the wall QR is generated automatically.

AdminAccommodationAddPage.title: Add accommodation
AdminAccommodationAddPage.description: Create a new property. A secret scan token for the wall QR is generated automatically.

SEO.title: Partnerships
SEO.description: Links between accommodations and partner hospitalities. Each row is one perk guests unlock after scanning the in-room QR.

AdminPartnershipsPage.title: Partnerships
AdminPartnershipsPage.description: Links between accommodations and partner hospitalities. Each row is one perk guests unlock after scanning the in-room QR.
AdminPartnershipsPage.caption: Partnerships

SEO.title: Partnerships
SEO.description: Your partnership links and requests. Each active row is a perk guests unlock after scanning the in-room QR.

PartnershipsHeader.title: Partnerships
PartnershipsHeader.description: Links between your accommodations and partner venues, plus the requests waiting on either side.

PartnershipsActiveTab.caption: Active partnerships
PartnershipsActiveTab.setBenefitDescription: Guests of the linked accommodation will see this offer at your venue.

PartnershipRequestItem.acceptDescription: Guests of the requesting accommodation will see your venue with the benefit you set below.
PartnershipRequestItem.declineDescription: The requester will see the request was declined. They can't send a new one unless you change your mind later.
PartnershipRequestItem.benefitHint: The offer guests will see. Example: 15% off

PartnershipsTabEmpty.active: No partnerships yet. Create one to give your guests extra perks.
PartnershipsTabEmpty.sent: You haven't sent any partnership requests yet.
PartnershipsTabEmpty.received: No pending requests for your venues.

SEO.title: Add partnership
SEO.description: Connect an accommodation to a partner hospitality. Guests of that accommodation see the offer after scanning the QR.

AdminPartnershipAddPage.title: Add partnership
AdminPartnershipAddPage.description: Connect an accommodation to a partner hospitality. Guests of that accommodation see the offer after scanning the QR.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.sectionPartnersDescription: Paste Convex document IDs from the accommodations and hospitalities admin lists.
AdminPartnershipAddPage.sectionOfferDescription: A short guest-facing benefit that staff can honor in person.

SEO.title: Hospitalities
SEO.description: Partner hospitalities — dining, experiences, and services linked to accommodations via partnerships.

AdminHospitalitiesPage.title: Hospitalities
AdminHospitalitiesPage.description: Partner hospitalities — dining, experiences, and services linked to accommodations via partnerships.

DeleteHospitalityButton.title: Delete this hospitality?
DeleteHospitalityButton.description: This permanently removes {hospitalityName} from the platform. Guests will no longer be able to view it or send reservation requests. An active partnership or open reservation must be cleared first.

SEO.title: Add hospitality
SEO.description: Register a new partner hospitality. You can edit any field later.

AdminHospitalityAddPage.title: Add hospitality
AdminHospitalityAddPage.description: Register a new partner hospitality. You can edit any field later.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests will see in the benefits list.

AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldPartnerTypeHint: Platform: a public venue every accommodation can be linked to and shown as a benefit. User: a private venue only its owner can link via a custom-partnership connect code — it never appears in other accommodations' benefits.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldBenefitHint: Shown to guests of every accommodation for platform partners.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldIsActiveDescription: Inactive hospitalities stay in the database but won't appear in benefit lists.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.sectionMenuDescription: Optional. Upload a menu file and/or link to an online menu.
AdminHospitalityAddPage.fieldMenuFileHint: Upload an image or a PDF of your menu.

SEO.title: Users
SEO.description: Search, filter, and manage user accounts.

AdminUsersPage.title: Users
AdminUsersPage.description: Search, filter, and manage user accounts.
AdminUsersPage.caption: Users

SEO.title: Add user
SEO.description: Create an account that can later own accommodations or hospitalities.

AdminUserAddPage.title: Add user
AdminUserAddPage.description: Create an account that can later own accommodations or hospitalities.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionAccountDescription: Use the person's real name and the email they will sign in with.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionCredentialsDescription: Set a temporary password. The user can change it after signing in.
AdminUserAddPage.fieldPasswordDescription: Use at least 8 characters and share it through a private channel.
AdminUserAddPage.sectionAccessDescription: Keep the default user role unless this account should manage the admin area.
AdminUserAddPage.fieldEmailVerifiedDescription: Enable only when you have already confirmed this address. Otherwise the user must verify before signing in.

SEO.title: User
SEO.description: View and manage a user account.

UserSessions.title: Active sessions
UserSessions.description: Devices currently signed in. Revoking signs the device out immediately.

UserAccounts.title: Linked accounts
UserAccounts.description: Sign-in providers connected to this user.

UserActivity.title: Activity
UserActivity.description: Audit log entries scoped to this user. Newest first.
UserActivity.caption: Activity

UserDangerZone.title: Danger zone
UserDangerZone.description: Account-level actions. Changes here are audited and may be irreversible.
UserDangerZone.removeAdmin: Remove admin privileges from this account.
UserDangerZone.grantAdmin: Grant admin privileges to this account.
UserDangerZone.upgradePlan: Upgrade this account to the Pro plan (unlimited custom partnerships).
UserDangerZone.downgradePlan: Downgrade this account to the free plan (custom partnerships only during the 1-month trial).
UserDangerZone.liftBan: Lift the ban so the user can sign in again.
UserDangerZone.signOutPrevent: Sign the user out and prevent further sign-ins.
UserDangerZone.deleteRowDescription: Permanently remove this user, their sessions, and linked provider accounts. This cannot be undone.

BanUserDialog.title: Ban {email}
BanUserDialog.description: The user is signed out and cannot sign in again until unbanned. The optional reason is shown on next sign-in attempt.

ChangeRoleButton.demoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will immediately lose admin privileges.
ChangeRoleButton.promoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will gain full admin privileges, including the ability to ban and delete other accounts.

ChangePlanButton.upgradeDescription: The user gets unlimited custom partnerships immediately.
ChangePlanButton.downgradeDescription: The user goes back to the free plan — new custom partnerships then require an active 1-month trial. Existing partnerships are not removed.

DeleteUserDialog.title: Delete {email}?
DeleteUserDialog.description: This is permanent and cascades to sessions and accounts. Type the email below to confirm.
DeleteUserDialog.adminDescription: Admins must be demoted to "user" before they can be deleted.

UserPageEmpty.title: User not found
UserPageEmpty.description: The user you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been deleted.

AdminUserPage.errorDescription: Something went wrong while fetching this user. Please try again.

SEO.title: Admin analytics
SEO.description: Platform-wide trends for guest scans, hospitality discovery, reservation demand, and conversion.

AdminAnalyticsHeader.title: Analytics
AdminAnalyticsHeader.description: Platform-wide trends for guest scans, hospitality discovery, reservation demand, and conversion.

AdminAnalyticsTrendChart.title: Platform activity
AdminAnalyticsTrendChart.description: Global guest activity and reservation demand over the last 30 days.

AdminAnalyticsPage.errorHeaderDescription: The analytics snapshot could not be loaded right now. Your other admin tools are still available.
AdminAnalyticsPage.errorBody: Something went wrong while loading analytics
AdminAnalyticsPage.errorBodyDescription: This is usually temporary. Retry to refresh metrics, trends, and top entity rankings.

PasswordResetVerifyForm.codeFormat: Use the 8-digit code from your email.
PasswordResetVerifyForm.passwordTooCommon: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.

SignUpForm.passwordTooCommon: That password is too common. Please choose a stronger one.

EmailVerificationForm.codeFormat: Use the 8-digit code from your email.

CreateAccommodationSchema.coordinatesRequired: Enter a complete address so latitude and longitude can be filled in automatically.

CreateHospitalitySchema.coordinatesRequired: Pick an address from the suggestions so we can place the map pin.
CreateHospitalitySchema.benefitMaxLength: Benefit must be 15 characters or fewer.

CreateCustomPartnershipSchema.benefitMaxLength: Benefit must be 15 characters or fewer.

CreateReservationSchema.guestCountInvalid: Enter a valid number of guests.

ContactSection.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters.
ContactSection.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters.

SEO.title: Report an issue
SEO.description: Tell us about a bug or anything else you ran into.

ReportHeader.title: Tell us what happened
ReportHeader.intro: Found a bug or something that didn't feel right? A few words is all we need — we read every report.

ReportPage.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Describe what you were doing and what went wrong. The more detail, the faster we can fix it.
ReportPage.fieldEmailDescription: Leave your email if you'd like us to follow up.

SEO.title: Connect a partnership
SEO.description: Link one of your accommodations with a hospitality venue.

CreateCustomPartnershipHeader.title: Create a custom partnership
CreateCustomPartnershipHeader.description: Pick one of your accommodations, then enter the connect code of the venue you want to link with.

CreateCustomPartnershipForm.sectionDescription: Pick your accommodation, then enter the venue's connect code. Your own venues connect instantly; other owners' venues receive a request first.
CreateCustomPartnershipForm.connectCodeHint: Ask the venue owner for their connect code.
CreateCustomPartnershipForm.ownVenueBenefitHint: Guests of this accommodation will see this offer at your venue.
CreateCustomPartnershipForm.partnerVenueBenefitHint: The venue owner will set the guest offer when they accept your request.
CreateCustomPartnershipForm.benefitHint: The offer guests will see. Example: 15% off

CreateCustomPartnershipFormActions.trialHint: Your 1-month free trial starts when your first custom partnership goes live.
CreateCustomPartnershipFormActions.hint: If the venue belongs to another owner, they'll need to accept before it goes live.
CreateCustomPartnershipFormActions.hintOwnVenue: This connects instantly — guests will see the benefit you set above.

CustomPartnershipTrialNotice.title: Your free trial has ended
CustomPartnershipTrialNotice.description: Custom partnerships are paused for this account. Pro plan upgrades aren't available yet — check back soon.

RevokePartnershipDialog.title: Revoke this partnership?
RevokePartnershipDialog.description: This removes the link between {accommodationName} and {hospitalityName}. Guests will no longer see the benefit at this venue.

DeleteAccommodationDialog.title: Delete this accommodation?
DeleteAccommodationDialog.description: This permanently removes {accommodationName} from your account. Guests will no longer be able to scan its QR code. Active guest sessions or partnerships must be cleared first.

DeleteHospitalityDialog.title: Delete this hospitality?
DeleteHospitalityDialog.description: This permanently removes {hospitalityName} from your account. Guests will no longer be able to view it or send reservation requests. Open reservations or partnerships must be cleared first.

SelectAccommodationDialogError.title: Could not load accommodations
SelectAccommodationDialogError.description: Please try again in a moment.

SelectAccommodationDialogEmpty.title: No accommodations yet
SelectAccommodationDialogEmpty.description: Add an accommodation to your account before creating a partnership.

StartProTrialDialog.title: Start your free Pro trial?
StartProTrialDialog.description: Enabling the trial unlocks hospitality creation and every other Pro feature. It will be valid from {startDate} until {endDate}.
StartProTrialDialog.question: Are you sure you want to start the trial?

SEO.title: Add hospitality
SEO.description: Add a venue you run yourself. Link it to your accommodations afterwards with its connect code.

AddHospitalityHeader.title: Add hospitality
AddHospitalityHeader.description: Add a venue you run yourself. It stays private until an admin publishes it; use its connect code to create partnerships.

AddHospitalityAccessNotice.title: Try hospitality creation free for 1 month
AddHospitalityAccessNotice.description: Your account doesn't have access to create hospitalities yet. Start your free 1-month trial to unlock this and every other Pro feature instantly. When the trial ends, you'll need a paid plan to keep going.
AddHospitalityAccessNotice.expiredDescription: Creating new hospitalities is paused for this account. Pro plan upgrades aren't available yet — check back soon. Your existing hospitalities and partnerships are unaffected.

AddHospitalityForm.sectionBasicsDescription: What guests will see in the benefits list.
AddHospitalityForm.sectionLocationDescription: Shown on your public hospitality page.
AddHospitalityForm.fieldCoordinatesPlaceholder: These will automatically populate once you wrote the address
AddHospitalityForm.sectionContactDescription: Phone number guests can use to contact this hospitality.
AddHospitalityForm.sectionImagesDescription: The first image is the cover. Add one or more; star any image to make it the cover.
AddHospitalityForm.sectionMenuDescription: Optional. Upload a menu file and/or link to an online menu.
AddHospitalityForm.fieldMenuFileHint: Upload an image or a PDF of your menu.
AddHospitalityForm.sectionDetailsDescription: Short description shown on the benefits page.
AddHospitalityForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on the benefits page.
AddHospitalityForm.fieldBenefitHint: Short offer guests see when this venue is linked to an accommodation.

AddHospitalityVisibilityNotice.title: Not shown to anyone on its own
AddHospitalityVisibilityNotice.description: This hospitality is never displayed by itself anywhere on the platform. Guests only see it through the accommodations you partner with.

RequestReservationDialog.title: Request Reservation
RequestReservationDialog.descriptionWithName: Fill in your details and {hospitalityName} will contact you to confirm.
RequestReservationDialog.description: Fill in your details and the hospitality will contact you to confirm.
RequestReservationDialog.fieldPhoneDescription: If your number is not Serbian, please write the full number with your country prefix (+...) and make sure it is a WhatsApp number — the hospitality owner will reach you there directly.
RequestReservationDialog.warningBody: The hospitality owner WILL contact you to confirm your reservation. If you do not answer back in time, your reservation WILL BE CANCELLED.

SEO.title: Guest benefits for accommodations and hospitalities
SEO.description: A premium QR benefits network for accommodations and hospitalities. Guests scan in-room, discover curated local offers, and send reservation requests.

HeroSection.imageAlt: Warm accommodation room with a blank welcome card on a bedside table
HeroSection.heading: The best local places, the moment guests arrive.
HeroSection.description: Guests scan one QR code in the room, unlock curated local benefits, and request reservations from partner hospitalities. Accommodations join free. Hospitality partners receive guests who are already minutes away.

BenefitsSection.heading: What you get, in plain words.
BenefitsSection.lead: Two kinds of owners use the platform. Find the one that is you, and read straight down the list.
BenefitsSection.accommodationsIntro: List your place for free. Your guests get real perks nearby — and that makes guests pick you.
BenefitsSection.accommodationPoint1Body: The minute you join, your guests get real benefits at the hospitalities we already partner with. You set nothing up — it works from arrival.
BenefitsSection.accommodationPoint2Body: Guests who arrive to a free local perk rate their accommodation higher. Better reviews bring more bookings. It compounds over every season.
BenefitsSection.accommodationPoint3Body: An accommodation with real perks nearby beats the one next door that offers nothing. Give them a reason before they even arrive.
BenefitsSection.accommodationPoint4Body: Know a local spot we do not partner with yet? The ability to pair up with them directly, one to one, is coming soon. Pricing for that feature has not been decided yet.
BenefitsSection.hospitalitiesIntro: Partner with us and reach guests who are already nearby — staying in the apartments and hotels around you.
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint1Body: Not random clicks. Real people staying minutes away, deciding where to go right now.
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint2Title: Get in front of every accommodation
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint2Body: Become a partner hospitality and you are shown to every apartment and hotel on the platform at once — automatically, without chasing each one.
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint3Title: You control the offer, we bring the guests
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint3Body: We work with you to design a perk that fills your quiet hours. You approve it, you honor it — no surprises, nothing imposed.
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint4Title: Pay only when guests actually show up
BenefitsSection.hospitalityPoint4Body: No upfront fee, no monthly bill. Our commission is tied to real, verified redemptions — nothing we cannot both see and count.
BenefitsSection.preferDirectConversation: Prefer a direct conversation? Reach us on Viber or WhatsApp.
BenefitsSection.footerBold: Free for hosts, pay-per-result for hospitalities.
BenefitsSection.footer: Each side makes the other more valuable — and that balance is the whole platform.

GuestFlowSection.heading: From room scan to confirmed reservation.
GuestFlowSection.lead: The entire journey is visible, short, and understandable. No download, no guest account, no confusing handoff.
GuestFlowSection.step1Title: QR code waits in the accommodation
GuestFlowSection.step1Body: A guest arrives and finds one QR card inside the accommodation. No app, no account, no reception explanation needed.
GuestFlowSection.step2Title: Guest opens the accommodation benefits page
GuestFlowSection.step2Body: The page is tied to that accommodation and shows benefits selected for that exact accommodation.
GuestFlowSection.step3Body: They open a partner page, check the offer, location, and details, then decide if it fits their plan.
GuestFlowSection.step4Body: If reservations are enabled, the guest sends a short request with name, guest count, time, phone, and optional email.
GuestFlowSection.step5Title: The request is sent and tracked
GuestFlowSection.step5Body: The hospitality owner receives the request, contacts the guest if needed, then confirms or declines it from the dashboard.
GuestFlowSection.step6Body: The guest sees the reservation confirmed, and the hospitality owner has the visit recorded in the dashboard.

FeaturesSection.heading: Behind the scan, a dashboard you actually run.
FeaturesSection.lead: Your guest sees one clean page. Underneath it, you get the real thing — the partnerships they unlock, the reservations they send, and the numbers behind every visit.

FeatureFourRightSide.heading: Benefits from the day you register.
FeatureFourRightSide.includedBody: Register your accommodation for free and your guests instantly unlock benefits from our platform's partner hospitalities — real discounts at the best places nearby. No setup, no negotiation, guaranteed from day one.
FeatureFourRightSide.customEyebrow: Coming soon — your own custom partnerships
FeatureFourRightSide.customBody: On top of the included benefits, you will soon be able to form your own partnerships directly with other hospitalities, with the discounts or perks you arrange yourself. Pricing has not been finalized yet.

FeatureFourLeftSide.cardDescription: Benefits guests unlock on this accommodation.

FeatureThreeLeftSide.heading: Requests never disappear into a form.
FeatureThreeLeftSide.hospitalityBody: Review each request, reach the guest by phone, then confirm, decline, or mark a no-show. Every outcome stays on your dashboard.
FeatureThreeLeftSide.accommodationBody: Your guests never hit a dead end. They can see whether a request is still pending or already confirmed, straight from the accommodation page.

FeatureThreeRightSide.requestsDescription: Example dashboard data for one hospitality.

FeatureTwoRightSide.heading: Know which partnerships are working.
FeatureTwoRightSide.accommodationBody: Rank the hospitality partners guests open most often, so your benefit list can stay relevant.
FeatureTwoRightSide.hospitalityBody: Rank the accommodations sending the most guest attention and reservation intent to your hospitality.

FeatureTwoLeftSide.accommodationTableDescription: Example source accommodations sending guests to this hospitality.
FeatureTwoLeftSide.hospitalityTableDescription: Example partner hospitalities receiving attention from this accommodation.

FeatureOneLeftSide.heading: See where guest demand is moving.
FeatureOneLeftSide.accommodationBody: Track QR scans, guest activations, partner performance, and reservation requests for each accommodation.
FeatureOneLeftSide.hospitalityBody: See which accommodations introduce guests to your hospitality, then follow the path from view to reservation request.

FeatureOneRightSide.accommodationDescription: Example dashboard data for one accommodation.
FeatureOneRightSide.hospitalityDescription: Example dashboard data for one hospitality.

PricingSection.heading: Almost all of it is free.
PricingSection.lead: No card to sign up, no monthly bill to use it. You only pay if you choose extras — and even then, only in the way that fits your side.
PricingSection.footer: No credit card to start. You upgrade only if — and when — it actually helps you.

PricingSectionAccommodations.title: If you host guests
PricingSectionAccommodations.feature1: Guest perks from platform partners, from day one
PricingSectionAccommodations.feature2: Full analytics — every scan, activation, and reservation
PricingSectionAccommodations.customBody: Forming your own partnerships directly with other hospitalities is on our roadmap. Pricing for that feature has not been set yet — everything above stays free either way.

PricingSectionHospitalities.title: If you serve guests
PricingSectionHospitalities.feature2: Shown to every accommodation on the platform
PricingSectionHospitalities.feature3: We help you shape the guest offer
PricingSectionHospitalities.payTitle: You only pay on real results
PricingSectionHospitalities.payBody: No monthly fee. When a guest actually redeems an offer, we share a small commission on that visit — verified, and only on guests we genuinely bring you.

StandardsSection.heading: Curated means both sides look good.
StandardsSection.lead: If a partnership does not improve the guest experience and send the right kind of demand to the hospitality partner, it does not belong on the page.
StandardsSection.item2: Real benefits staff can honor in person.
StandardsSection.item3: No guest app, account, or login wall.
StandardsSection.item4: Property-specific partner lists, never an ad-ranked directory.

FaqSection.heading: Still wondering? Start here.
FaqSection.lead: The short, honest answers to what owners ask us most.
FaqSection.q1Question: Is it really free for accommodations?
FaqSection.q1Answer: Yes. Registering and using the core platform is free, forever. Your guests get perks from partner hospitalities and you get full analytics — no card required to start. Forming your own custom partnerships is coming soon.
FaqSection.q2Question: What does it cost a hospitality?
FaqSection.q2Answer: Nothing upfront and no monthly fee. You share a small commission only when a guest actually redeems one of your offers — so you pay on real results, never on a number you have to report.
FaqSection.q3Question: How do you know a guest came from us?
FaqSection.q3Answer: Every benefit is redeemed in person against an offer tied to a real transaction, so both sides see the same thing. We never ask for your books, your POS, or your turnover.
FaqSection.q4Question: Do guests need an app or an account?
FaqSection.q4Answer: No. A guest scans one QR code in the room and the page opens instantly — no install, no login, no sign-up between arrival and discovery.
FaqSection.q5Question: How do I get my QR code?
FaqSection.q5Answer: It is generated automatically the moment you register your accommodation. Print it, place it in the room, and it works from the next guest who arrives.
FaqSection.q6Answer: Forming your own partnership directly with a specific hospitality is coming soon and currently in development. We have not finalized pricing for it yet — everything else on the platform stays free regardless.
FaqSection.q7Answer: We are starting in Belgrade and saturating it first, then expanding from there. If you operate nearby, reach out — early partners help shape where we go next.

ContactLeftContent.description: Large operators, boutique accommodations, restaurants, bars, spas, tours, and local experiences can all enter through the same conversation.

ContactRightContent.formDescription: Tell us whether you run accommodations, hospitalities, or both. We will reply with the best next step for your network.
ContactRightContent.messagePlaceholder: City, number of accommodations or hospitalities, and what kind of partnership you want to build.
ContactRightContent.footer: No spam. Just a practical reply about your accommodation or hospitality network.
